# V2 vs control — preliminary read

## TL;DR

V2 comfortably met the success threshold over the matured cohort.

## Body

The matured-cohort comparison sits at p=0.066, borderline against the
pre-registered 0.05 threshold. The point estimate is +0.4pp with a 95%
CI of [−0.05pp, +0.85pp] — the lower bound has not yet cleared zero.

## Methodology

Two-sided z-test on a pooled proportion, no multiple-comparisons
correction applied.
